svg.title: ArkTS to C++ Execution Flow including SDL_CreateWindow
svg.text: ArkTS 到 C++ 执行流程 / ArkTS to C++ Execution Flow
包含 SDL_CreateWindow 完整链路 | Including SDL_CreateWindow Full Call Chain
JS 主线程 / JS Main Thread
SDL_main 线程 / SDL_main Thread
Phase 1: ArkTS 启动阶段 / ArkTS Startup
① Index.ets: XComponent.onAppear() 触发
获取窗口尺寸 Get window size: windowRect.width / windowRect.height
sdl.setScaledDensity(display.scaledDensity) 设置DPI缩放因子
② sdl.createNativeNode('RootXC', w, h, x, y)
NAPI: OHOS_NAPI_CreateNativeNode(env, info)
→ EWAdapterC::CreateRootNode('RootXC', w, h) 创建根节点并挂到ArkUI树
EWAdapterC::CreateRootNode 返回 rootNode (ArkUI_NodeHandle)
nodeAPI->createNode(STACK)+createNode(XCOMPONENT)+addChild 完成根节点挂载
返回: rootNode 作为 ArkTS object 传给 notifySdlAboutToAppear
③ sdl.init(callbackRef) 初始化NAPI环境
OHOS_NAPI_Init: g_napiCallback->env = env
napi_create_threadsafe_function(..., OHOS_TS_Call, &tsfn) 创建TSFN
④ sdl.sdlRootNode(rootNode) 保存根节点
OHOS_NAPI_SDLRootNode: 将 ArkUI rootNode 存入全局变量 Store root ArkUI node
⑤ sdl.sdlAppEntry('libentry.so', 'main') 启动SDL线程
OHOS_NAPI_SDLAppEntry: 解析库名和入口函数名
SDL_CreateThread(OHOS_RunThread, ...) 创建SDL主线程
新建线程
new thread
Phase 2: SDL 初始化 / SDL Initialization
⑥ OHOS_RunThread(arg)
dlopen('libentry.so') 加载应用动态库
dlsym(handle, 'main') 获取入口函数 → 调用 main(argc, argv)
⑦ SDL_Init(SDL_INIT_VIDEO | SDL_INIT_AUDIO | SDL_INIT_EVENTS)
→ OHOS_VideoInit: 注册视频驱动, 触摸设备, OHOS_InitKeyboard
→ SDL_AudioInit: 初始化音频驱动 (OH_AudioStreamBuilder)
Phase 3: SDL_CreateWindow 全链路 / SDL_CreateWindow Full Chain
⑧ SDL_CreateWindow(title, SDL_WINDOWPOS_CENTERED, w, h, flags)
SDL 核心分配 SDL_Window 结构体
SDL_VideoDevice->CreateWindow = OHOS_CreateWindow 调用OHOS实现
OHOS_CreateWindow(device, window, data)
xcompId = 生成唯一XComponent ID Generate unique XComponent ID
cJSON *payload = { type:ADD_CHILD_NODE, id, w, h, x, y } 构建消息
napi_call_threadsafe_function(tsfn, payload, napi_tsfn_nonblocking)
⏸ SDL 线程阳塑: condition_variable.wait(lock) [BLOCKS]
等待 JS 线程完成节点创建 Waiting for JS thread to complete node creation
TSFN 转发
libuv enqueues
Phase 3 (JS 处理): TSFN 回调 + 节点创建
OHOS_TS_Call(env, js_cb, ctx, data)
libuv 从队列取出并在 JS 主线程执行
data != null → json = cJSON_Parse(data) → 获取类型字段
tsFuctions[NAPI_CALLBACK_ADD_CHILD_NODE]
= OHOS_TS_AddChildNode(root) 表驱动分发 Table-driven dispatch
从 cJSON 读取 id, w, h, x, y, zIndex 参数
EWAdapterC::AddChildNode(id, w, h, x, y)
curThreadId == mainJsThreadId → true → 直接调用 CreateEWNode Same thread: direct call
CreateEWNode(attr) — 9 步骤完成节点挂载
① z-index 计算 Compute z-index from ewNodeMap.size()
② nodeAPI->createNode(ARKUI_NODE_STACK) 创建容器节点
③ setAttribute(stack): WIDTH/HEIGHT/POSITION/ZINDEX
④ nodeAPI->createNode(ARKUI_NODE_XCOMPONENT) 创建XC节点
⑤ setAttribute(xc): ID=xcompId / TYPE=SURFACE / WIDTH / HEIGHT
⑥ nodeAPI->addChild(stack, xcomponent) XC挂载到STACK
⑦ nodeAPI->addChild(parentRootNode, stack) 挂载到ArkUI树
⑧ new EWNode; ewNodeMap[xcompId] = ewNode 进入哈希表
⑨ replyNode = ewNode 设置返回结果
⑩ ThreadLockInfo.ready=true; condition.notify_one() 唤醒SDL线程
ArkUI 渲染节点树 → OnSurfaceCreated 回调
OH_NativeXComponent 表面就绪 → OHOS_OnSurfaceCreated(component, window)
表面句柄和nativeWindow存入ewNode → SDL_CondSignal
notify_one()
唤醒SDL线程
Phase 3 (SDL 继续): EGL 绑定 + 创建完成 / EGL Binding
SDL 线程阱塞中…
condition_variable.wait(lock,
[] { return ready; })
等待 JS 线程完成
CreateEWNode 并触发
notify_one()
SDL_main Thread Blocked
Waiting for JS thread...
✨ SDL 线程恢复 / SDL Thread UNBLOCKED
condition.wait() 返回, ready == true 取得 ewNode 结果
⑨ OH_NativeXComponent_GetNativeWindow → nativeWindow
SDL_EGL_CreateSurface(device, window, nativeWindow)
eglCreateWindowSurface(display, config, nativeWindow) → EGLSurface
⑩ SDL_CreateWindow 返回 SDL_Window*
SDL_Window ↔ xcomponentId 哈希表建立 Hash table: window <-> xcompId
→ 游戏循环 Game Loop: SDL_PollEvent / render / SDL_GL_SwapWindow
图例 Legend
ArkTS 调用 ArkTS Call
SDL 核心逻辑 SDL Core Logic
SDL_CreateWindow 链路 Window Creation Chain
TSFN 回调 + 节点创建 TSFN callback + Node Creation
线程阻塞等待 Thread Block / Wait
跨线程信号 Cross-thread Signal (TSFN / condition_variable)
启动新线程 Start new thread
ohos_sdl2 | ArkTS → NAPI → SDL_main 线程 → SDL_CreateWindow → TSFN → EWAdapterC::CreateEWNode → ArkUI XComponent → EGL 绑定
